description_long: This is a round, single-tier celebration cake with a smooth, pastel pink exterior and white piped icing borders along the top and bottom edges. The cake features a decorative blue 'GB' topper standing upright at the center, and the side is adorned with the text 'GB 10 ans' in purple and blue, along with a subtle line graphic and a delicate monogram. The cake sits on a flat, circular, terracotta-colored plate that provides a stable base. The surface of the cake is matte and appears to be covered in fondant, giving it a sleek, uniform finish. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with a focus on clean lines and subtle color contrasts.
description: A round, pink celebration cake with white piped icing, a blue 'GB' topper, and 'GB 10 ans' text, displayed on a terracotta plate. The design is minimalist and modern with a smooth fondant finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GB' topper, 'GB 10 ans' text, and decorative monogram clearly on the pink cake with white icing borders.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue topper seen edge-on and only a partial glimpse of the side text and monogram.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the blue 'GB' topper and the smooth, undecorated pink surface with white icing borders.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the blue topper edge-on and a partial view of the monogram, with no visible text.
